title: Verify Loss Aversion message appears when user clicks Cancel
description: Test that when user clicks Cancel Trial button, loss aversion intervention modal appears
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner hub

steps.description: 2. Click on 'Cancel Trial' button in Manage Trial section

expected_result: Modal displays headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', shows remaining days info, with 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as primary action and 'Cancel Anyway' as secondary action
